original_image_tags: A beige or off-white envelope, aged. A purple US postage stamp is in the upper right corner. A postmark is centered at the top. The main address is hand-addressed in purple ink.
Circular postmark with wavy cancellation lines extending to the right over the stamp.

elements.description: One purple United States Postage stamp in the upper right corner, featuring a profile of Thomas Jefferson and the text 'UNITED STATES POSTAGE', 'THOMAS JEFFERSON', '1701-1809', and '3 CENTS 3'. The stamp is cancelled by a circular postmark from 'CINCINNATI, OHIO 45' dated 'JUL 3 1952 9:30 PM' and several wavy cancellation lines.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content of an aged envelope with a purple US postage stamp in the upper right corner and a circular postmark with wavy cancellation lines, but Description B adds specific quoted text (stamp text, postmark details) that Description A omits without contradicting it.
